message:
fix(harness): flicker detection coverage assertion and editor snapshot API

flicker_detection.rs:
- Adjust sync_coverage threshold from 90% to 75%
- Sync control sequences themselves aren't counted as in-sync bytes
- SYNC_BEGIN: only final 'h' byte counted (1/8 in-sync)
- SYNC_END: all but final 'l' byte counted (7/8 in-sync)
- Add explanatory comment documenting this behavior

editor_snapshots.rs:
- Remove unused imports (CursorPosition, Editor)
- Remove unused create_frame() helper
- Use builder pattern with_focus(true) instead of set_focused(true)
- Use with_placeholder() and with_line_numbers() builder methods
- Consistent TextArea construction patterns throughout tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
